title: festuca rubra var. duriuscula
intro: Festuca rubra var. duriuscula, also known as the red fescue or rough fescue, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca rubra var. duriuscula include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by creating a tincture, and can be used to treat a range of ailments.
